nodes.name: Website: New Automation Request
nodes.notes: Tumhari website ka form/chat isi URL par POST karega. Body: { client_name, client_email, client_phone, requirement_text }

nodes.name: Search for Matching Template
nodes.notes: Supabase ka connection string 'Postgres' credential type se hi use hota hai n8n mein (Project Settings > Database mein milega).

nodes.name: Deploy via n8n API (Matched)
nodes.notes: Credential setup: Header Auth banao, Name='X-N8N-API-KEY', Value=apni n8n API key (Settings > API se milegi). N8N_HOST environment variable mein apna n8n server URL daalo.

parameters.subject: =✅ Auto-matched & Deployed: {{ $json.client_name }}
parameters.message: =New client request auto-matched an existing template ({{ $('Evaluate Match').item.json.best_match.template_name }}, {{ Math.round($('Evaluate Match').item.json.best_match.similarity * 100) }}% match) and deployed automatically. No action needed.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "requirement_text": "You are an expert n8n workflow architect. Given this client automation requirement, generate a complete, valid n8n workflow JSON (nodes + connections). Follow n8n's exact JSON schema: each node needs id, name, type, typeVersion, position, parameters. Use n8n-nodes-base.webhook for intake, n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest for AI calls, n8n-nodes-base.code for logic, n8n-nodes-base.googleSheets or n8n-nodes-base.postgres for data storage, n8n-nodes-base.gmail for email, n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook to reply. Return ONLY the JSON object, no prose, no markdown fences. Client requirement: " + $json.requirement_text } }}

nodes.name: Coding Agent: Generate New Workflow
nodes.notes: Yeh ab hamare apne agent_wrapper_server.py (Gemini CLI wrapper, Railway par deployed) ko call karta hai. URL ko apni actual wrapper service ke Railway domain se replace karo. Koi OpenAI credential ki zaroorat nahi ab is node mein.

nodes.name: Save to Review Queue (Supabase)
nodes.notes: status = 'needs_building' agar JSON invalid tha, ya 'in_review' agar valid JSON ban gaya lekin abhi tumhare approval ka wait hai. Yeh MVP mein HAMESHA human review se guzarta hai — pura autonomous deploy risky hai abhi.

parameters.subject: =🔔 New Custom Automation Needed: {{ $('Website: New Automation Request').item.json.body.client_name }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "status": "processing", "message": "Your automation request has been received. Our team will confirm shortly." } }}

meta.description: Workflow 20: The Automation Factory core. Receives a client's plain-language automation request from the website, checks it against existing templates via vector similarity, auto-deploys if a strong match exists, otherwise generates a new draft via AI (or your own coding agent), saves it for human review, and emails you either way.
